case_title: C&C OF S.F.,TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INV.DIV. VS PINELL, BAYARDO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,472.52 FILED BY C&C OF S.F.,TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INV.DIV. AS TO DEFENDANT PINELL, BAYARDO PINELL, GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C&C OF S.F.,TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFC/INV.DIV. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINELL, BAYARDO PINELL, GUADALUPE $2,472.52 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,472.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE MADE TO ALLOW TO GO TO JUDGMENT AS DEF TS.HAVE SAME NAMES&SAME AMOUNT&SAME CALENDAR(DAY& TIME SAME)W/ANOTHER CASE.
SERVICE WAIVED ON PLTF'S CLAIM TO ALLOW TO ENTER JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-1995, ADMINISTRATIVE CONTINUANCE TO DEC-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
